sections.paragraph:
μολύνω [cp. μέλας] ‘cause no longer to be in a pure condition’, make dirty, sully, defile in NT always expressive of moral or cultic impurity

—a. of clothes, in imagery of moral or spiritual condition Rv 3:4.

—b. of conscience, in awareness of cultic transgression 1 Cor 8:7.

—c. of sexual activity Rv 14:4.

—d. in general, of making a wrong decision Ac 5:38 v.l.
